title: Persona Definition
description: A persona defines interaction style and decision policy independently of capability. The same agent can be a Supportive Mentor or a Strict Examiner without changing its skills, tools or memory.

tone.description: Short description of communication tone, e.g. 'warm and encouraging'.

promptOverlay.description: Prompt text (or relative path ending in .md) appended to the agent's system prompt to shape behaviour.

decisionPolicy.description: Adjustments to decision-making, interpreted by the agent runtime.

compatibleAgents.description: Agent ids this persona may be applied to. Empty means any.
